global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with bold text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Encouraging viewers to binge-watch new content.

elements.label: Abstract orange background
elements.description: A vibrant orange background with geometric shapes creating a dynamic visual effect.

elements.label: Main content area
elements.description: A large central area featuring a soft, rounded shape that contrasts with the background.

elements.label: Top decorative element
elements.description: A subtle, rounded shape at the top of the ad, blending into the background.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, white text stating 'Binge starts now' prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline that reads 'New hits every week'.

elements.label: Center decorative element
elements.description: An abstract shape in the center that adds visual interest without being a focal point.

elements.label: Lower decorative element
elements.description: A rounded shape at the bottom center, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Logo text
elements.description: The word 'MoonScreen' in a bold font, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Watch now' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Additional decorative element
elements.description: A small circular shape positioned in the center, adding to the design complexity.

elements.label: Additional text
elements.description: Text at the bottom stating 'Binge starts now New hits every week', emphasizing the offer.
elements.text_content: Binge starts now New hits every week

elements.label: Logo text
elements.description: The word 'MoonScreen' in a bold font, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom center with the text 'Watch now' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top left, indicating user-generated content.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, with supporting text below it, and the CTA button at the bottom.
